questions.question: What is the goal of POS tagging?
options: Assign a grammatical category (noun, verb, etc.) to each token
questions.explanation: POS tagging labels each token with its part of speech.

questions.question: Which tagset is the default for cross-lingual work?
questions.explanation: Universal Dependencies provides a coarser, language-agnostic 17-tag set.

questions.question: What does a bigram HMM POS tagger model?
options: P(tag | previous tag) transitions plus P(word | tag) emissions, decoded with Viterbi
questions.explanation: Bigram HMM uses tag transitions and word emissions; Viterbi finds the highest-probability sequence.

questions.question: What does the Viterbi algorithm compute for an HMM tagger?
options: The single highest-probability tag sequence via dynamic programming over the tag lattice
The marginal probability of each tag
questions.explanation: Viterbi finds the argmax sequence with O(n * |T|^2) dynamic programming.

questions.question: What does dependency parsing produce?
options: A tree where each word has one head word and a labeled grammatical relation
A constituency tree of NP/VP/PP labels
questions.explanation: 依存句法分析给出逐词（中心词，关系）边；成分句法分析给出嵌套的短语结构。

questions.question: 为何 PTB 词性标注的准确率上限在 97-98% 左右？
options: 模型在任何任务中都无法超过 98%
人工标注员只有约 97% 的时间达成一致，因此高于约 98% 的模型可能是在过拟合测试数据
questions.explanation: 标注员的不一致界定了可实现的准确率上限；非常高的数值往往意味着过拟合。

questions.question: 在 2026 年的 LLM 流水线中，词性标注为何仍然重要？
options: 词形还原、基于方面的情感分析、查询分解、结构化输出验证以及跨语言迁移，都仍然消耗词性标注或依存句法分析的结果
questions.explanation: 即便由 LLM 生成散文，词性标注和依存句法分析仍支撑许多结构化的下游任务。

questions.question: 在大多数生产环境的词性标注 / 句法分析任务中，你应该选用哪个库？
options: spaCy（或 stanza/trankit，用于最高准确率或更广语言覆盖）
questions.explanation: spaCy 提供快速的生产级词性标注 + 依存解析器；stanza/trankit 覆盖更广的语言。
